mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model (id, name, description, category_id, type_id, resource_group, create_user, author, series_name, model_size, max_seq_length, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{typeId}, #{resourceGroup}, #{createUser}, #{author}, #{seriesName}, #{modelSize}, #{maxSeqLength}, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO model_version (id, model_id, version_number, pvc_name, internal_path, source_type, nfs_server, nfs_path, weight_type, is_registered, status, is_locked, train_frame, train_type, train_strategy, train_time, final_loss, source_version, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES ( #{version.versionId}, #{modelId}, #{version.versionNumber}, #{version.storagePath.pvcName}NULL, #{version.storagePath.internalPath}NULL, #{version.storagePath.sourceType}NULL, #{version.storagePath.nfsServer}NULL, #{version.storagePath.nfsPath}NULL, #{version.weightType}, #{version.registered}, #{version.status}, #{version.locked}, #{version.trainingMetadata.trainFrame}NULL, #{version.trainingMetadata.trainType}NULL, #{version.trainingMetadata.trainStrategy}NULL, #{version.trainingMetadata.trainTime}NULL, #{version.trainingMetadata.finalLoss}NULL, #{version.trainingMetadata.sourceVersion}NULL, FALSE, NOW(), NOW() )
INSERT INTO model_tag (id, model_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{modelId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS m_id, m.name AS m_name, m.description AS m_description, m.category_id AS m_category_id, m.type_id AS m_type_id, m.resource_group AS m_resource_group, m.create_user AS m_create_user, m.author AS m_author, m.series_name AS m_series_name, m.model_size AS m_model_size, m.max_seq_length AS m_max_seq_length, mv.id AS v_id, mv.version_number AS v_version_number, mv.weight_type AS v_weight_type, mv.status AS v_status, mv.is_registered AS v_is_registered, mv.is_locked AS v_is_locked FROM model m LEFT JOIN model_version mv ON m.id = mv.model_id WHERE m.id = #{modelId}
SELECT id, name, description, category_id, type_id, resource_group, create_user, author, series_name, model_size, max_seq_length, create_time, update_time FROM model
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND type_id = #{typeId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model WHERE resource_group = #{resourceGroup}
mapper.update: UPDATE model SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, type_id = #{typeId}, resource_group = #{resourceGroup}, create_user = #{createUser}, author = #{author}, series_name = #{seriesName}, model_size = #{modelSize}, max_seq_length = #{maxSeqLength}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{modelId}

UPDATE model_version SET version_number = #{version.versionNumber}, pvc_name = #{version.storagePath.pvcName}NULL, internal_path = #{version.storagePath.internalPath}NULL, source_type = #{version.storagePath.sourceType}NULL, nfs_server = #{version.storagePath.nfsServer}NULL, nfs_path = #{version.storagePath.nfsPath}NULL, weight_type = #{version.weightType}, is_registered = #{version.registered}, status = #{version.status}, is_locked = #{version.locked}, train_frame = #{version.trainingMetadata.trainFrame}NULL, train_type = #{version.trainingMetadata.trainType}NULL, train_strategy = #{version.trainingMetadata.trainStrategy}NULL, train_time = #{version.trainingMetadata.trainTime}NULL, final_loss = #{version.trainingMetadata.finalLoss}NULL, source_version = #{version.trainingMetadata.sourceVersion}NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{version.versionId}
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM model_tag WHERE model_id = #{modelId}
